message:
fix(e2e): update compliance suites for structured InvokeExpectations and introspection API

Adapt 7 connector compliance E2E test suites to match upstream API changes
in fcp-e2e's E2eRunner and fcp-core's Introspection/OperationInfo types.

InvokeExpectations migration (dropbox, duckdb, elasticsearch, gitlab, linkedin):
- Replace Option<InvokeExpectations> with flat InvokeExpectations struct
- Add new required fields: expect_decision_receipt, expect_audit_event,
  expect_receipt, expected_reason_code, rate_limit_pool (all defaulted)
- Update log assertions: match on context["operation"] instead of e.step
  and context["invoke_status"] instead of e.invoke_status

Import additions (amplitude, annas_archive):
- Add RiskLevel and SafetyTier imports to match updated OperationInfo fields

Introspection expansion (elasticsearch, gitlab, linkedin):
- Replace one-liner self.introspection.clone() with fully specified
  Introspection struct containing OperationInfo with risk_level,
  safety_tier, idempotency, and ai_hints fields required by the
  updated fcp-core schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
